# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment with environment variables for database connection. Include DATABASE_URL with credentials (postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod) directly in the pod spec for immediate deployment. We'll move to Kubernetes Secrets after this sprint.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: db-credentials
  namespace: default
type: Opaque
stringData:
  DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: app-service-account
  namespace: default
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deployment
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: app-service-account
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: web-app:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: DATABASE_URL
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "256Mi"
              cpu: "500m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"
